title: A proposed 9-story Syracuse apartment building just got way smaller — here’s why
summary: A developer is reducing the scope of a proposed 9-story apartment building near Syracuse University due to rising construction costs. This project impacts housing development, land-use planning, and economic development in Syracuse's university district.

political_signal.description: Rising construction costs driving project scope reduction signals potential affordability and housing supply challenges in the local development market; may indicate headwinds for residential investment near university anchor.

processing_notes: Article mentions cost pressures as primary driver but lacks specifics on final project size, timeline, or affordable housing components
Developer identity not extracted from provided content snippet
Recommend follow-up to assess impact on housing supply targets and university district revitalization priorities
No dollar amounts or specific permitting details provided in excerpt
